title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!
